name: Eldorado Gold Corporation
description: Eldorado Gold Corporation is a gold producer operating mines in Türkiye (Kisladag open pit and Efemcukuru underground), Canada (Lamaque underground mine in Quebec), and Greece (Olympias polymetallic mine). The company generated $1.82 billion in revenue in 2025, a 38% increase year-over-year, and is developing the Skouries gold-copper project in northern Greece as its next major growth asset. Eldorado's diversified portfolio spans three established mining jurisdictions with strong free cash flow generation.
